title: EQ - Select a value, disconnect/connect device - the selected value persists
scenario: EQ setting (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom) does not persist after Bluetooth disconnect and reconnect
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen with a connected device that supports EQ.
2. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Select one of the available EQ values: Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ.
5. Disconnect the device from the phone (e.g., turn off Bluetooth on the phone or power off the device).
6. Reconnect the device (e.g., turn Bluetooth back on or power on the device and wait for auto-reconnection).
7. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
8. Observe the currently selected EQ value.
9. Repeat steps 1–8 for each remaining EQ value (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
expected: The selected EQ value (Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ) persists and remains selected after disconnecting and reconnecting the device, for all tested values.
